methodology.description: Controlled A/B evaluation with deterministic automated grading. Both conditions (with_skill, without_skill) are evaluated against identical assertion sets to ensure apples-to-apples comparison.
methodology.grading: Automated via grade-eval.py — no human judgment in the scoring loop. Outcome-weighted: strict validation pass is the primary metric.
conditions: with_skill: Agent has access to skills/okf-schema/SKILL.md
without_skill: Agent has no skill access; only okf-schema CLI help and the okf-v0.1.md specification

evals.prompt_with_skill: Fix the OKF bundle at skills-evals/fixtures/fix-non-conformant-bundle/ so it passes okf-schema validate --strict (zero errors AND zero warnings). First, copy the fixture to {{workspace}} and work ONLY in that directory. Use the SKILL.md workflow tips. Report every command you run and the final validation output.
evals.prompt_without_skill: You have a directory of markdown files at skills-evals/fixtures/fix-non-conformant-bundle/ that should follow the OKF (Open Knowledge Format) specification. The spec is at skills/okf-schema/references/okf-v0.1.md. First, copy the fixture to {{workspace}} and work ONLY in that directory. Use the okf-schema CLI to identify and fix all structural problems, missing metadata, broken links, and formatting issues so the bundle passes strict validation. Report every command you run and the final validation output.

assertions.text: The agent ran okf-schema validate --strict and it reported 0 errors, 0 warnings
The strict validation output reports zero warnings
The final validation states the bundle is conformant
The file missing-frontmatter.md now has YAML frontmatter with a type field
The file no-type.md now has a type field in its frontmatter

evals.prompt_with_skill: Fix the OKF bundle at skills-evals/fixtures/repair-knowledge-base/ so it passes okf-schema validate --strict (zero errors AND zero warnings). First, copy the fixture to {{workspace}} and work ONLY in that directory. The bundle has multiple issues: missing frontmatter, block-style lists, broken cross-links, missing index.md files, non-ISO date headings, and a schema file with wrong case. Use the SKILL.md workflow tips. Report every command you run and the final validation output.

Report every command you run and the final validation output.

The strict validation output reports zero warnings
The final validation states the bundle is conformant
The file missing-frontmatter.md now has YAML frontmatter with a type field
The cells/ subdirectory has an index.md file
The thermal/ subdirectory has an index.md file
The log.md file uses ISO 8601 date headings (YYYY-MM-DD)
The broken cross-link to nonexistent.md has been fixed or removed

evals.prompt_with_skill: Fix the OKF bundle at skills-evals/fixtures/schema-composition-trap/ so it passes okf-schema validate --strict (zero errors AND zero warnings). The bundle has a vehicle-config concept with powertrain and sensors fields, but the schema is WRONG: it declares both fields as strings instead of their actual types. First, copy the fixture to {{workspace}} and work ONLY in that directory. You must fix the schema files so that: (1) powertrain is validated as an object with type (string) and capacity_kwh (number) fields; (2) sensors is validated as an array of objects, each with id (string) and location (string) fields. Do NOT use --schema-db; rely on auto-discovery. Use SKILL.md tips about schema placement, naming, and auto-discovery. Report all commands and final validation output.
evals.prompt_without_skill: Fix the OKF bundle at skills-evals/fixtures/schema-composition-trap/ so it passes okf-schema validate --strict (zero errors AND zero warnings). The bundle has a vehicle-config concept with powertrain and sensors fields, but the schema validation is failing. First, copy the fixture to {{workspace}} and work ONLY in that directory. Use the okf-schema CLI and the OKF spec at skills/okf-schema/references/okf-v0.1.md to diagnose and fix the schema validation errors. Report all commands and final validation output.

assertions.text: The agent ran okf-schema validate --strict and it reported 0 errors, 0 warnings
The strict validation output reports zero warnings
The final validation states the bundle is conformant
vehicle-config.schema.json declares powertrain as an object type
vehicle-config.schema.json declares powertrain with object properties (type, capacity_kwh)
The agent did NOT use --schema-db flag, relying on auto-discovery
vehicle-config.schema.json declares sensors as an array of objects
vehicle-config.schema.json validates capacity_kwh as a number
